name: AGE OF KINGDOMS VR
summary:
👑 Your kingdom won't build itself!
🏰 Build your medieval kingdom from the ground up — in VR like never before! 
 Place buildings with your bare hands, 🌾 feed your people, ⚔️ train your army and 🛡️ defend everything you've built against raids and mythical monsters. Age of Kingdoms VR is the only medieval village builder made for VR — and it's waiting for you. 🔥
Will you rise to rule? 👑
